Uses of Package
com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx

  • Packages that use com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx 
    Package Description
    com.nexacro.java.xapi.data
    Define X-API Data Structure.
    com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx
    Conduct X-API Data Communication.
    com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.impl  
  • Classes in com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx used by com.nexacro.java.xapi.data 
    Class and Description
    PlatformException
    Exception indicating Platform exception.
  • Classes in com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx used by com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx 
    Class and Description
    DataDeserializer
    Read particular format data(stream) from InputStream or Reader, and transform to PlatformData.
    DataSerializer
    Transform PlatformData to particular format, and output as OutputStream or Writer.
    DataTypeChanger
    transform DataSet column data type(dataType) as data type(dataType) for transmission/reception.
    JavaTypeDataConverter
    transfor Java basic type data to other type data.
    JavaTypeDataSerializer
    transform Variable and DataSet to particular type and output by OutputStream or Writer.
    JavaTypePlatformResponse
    Transmit data(Variable and DataSet) with OutputStream or Writer.
    PartDataSerializer
    transform Variable and DataSet to particular type and output with OutputStream or Writer.
    PartPlatformResponse
    transmit data(Variable and DataSet) with OutputStream or Writer.
    PlatformException
    Exception indicating Platform exception.
    PlatformRequest
    receive data(PlatformData) from InputStream or Reader.
    PlatformResponse
    transmit data(PlatformData) with OutputStream or Writer.
  • Classes in com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx used by com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.impl 
    Class and Description
    DataDeserializer
    Read particular format data(stream) from InputStream or Reader, and transform to PlatformData.
    DataSerializer
    Transform PlatformData to particular format, and output as OutputStream or Writer.
    DataTypeChanger
    transform DataSet column data type(dataType) as data type(dataType) for transmission/reception.
    JavaTypeDataConverter
    transfor Java basic type data to other type data.
    JavaTypeDataSerializer
    transform Variable and DataSet to particular type and output by OutputStream or Writer.
    PartDataSerializer
    transform Variable and DataSet to particular type and output with OutputStream or Writer.
    PlatformException
    Exception indicating Platform exception.
    ProtocolDecoder
    process decompression, decryption of data(stream) read from InputStream or Reader.
    ProtocolEncoder
    output after processing data(stream) decompression and decryption with OutputStream or Writer.
